languages.text: {n}Одарив вас равнодушным взглядом напоследок, Смотритель исчезает в зеленой вспышке фазового перехода. Солдаты Крига, пришедшие в движение, поворачивают скрытые противогазами лица в вашу сторону и вскидывают лазружья.{/n}

{n}After gracing you with one last disinterested glance, the Warden phases out of reality in a flare of green light. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their faces covered by rebreathers in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Одарив вас равнодушным взглядом напоследок, Смотритель исчезает в зеленой вспышке фазового перехода. Солдаты Крига, пришедшие в движение, поворачивают скрытые противогазами лица в вашу сторону и вскидывают лазружья.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}After gracing you with one last disinterested glance, the Warden phases out of reality in a green flare. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their faces covered by rebreathers in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}

{n}After gracing you with one last disinterested glance, the Warden phases out of reality in a flare of green light. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their faces covered by rebreathers in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}
{n}With an icy chuckle, the Warden vanishes into thin air. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their deathly pale faces in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}

{n}After gracing you with one last disinterested glance, the Warden phases out of reality in a green flare. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their faces covered by rebreathers in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}

{n}After gracing you with one last disinterested glance, the Warden phases out of reality in a flare of green light. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their faces covered by rebreathers in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ウォーデンは冷酷な笑みを浮かべ、薄空気の中に消えていく。クリーグの兵士たちは動き出し、死んだように白い顔であなたの方を向いて、ラスガンを構える。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With an icy chuckle, the Warden vanishes into thin air. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their deathly pale faces in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ウォーデンは冷酷な笑みを浮かべ、薄 air に消えていく。Kriegs の兵士たちは動き出し、死んだように白い顔であなたの方を向いて、ラスガンを構える。

languages.text: {n}Tras dedicarte una última mirada de desinterés, el guardián desaparece de la realidad en un destello de luz verde. Los soldados de Krieg entran en acción, dirigiendo sus caras cubiertas por respiradores hacia ti y levantando sus rifles láser.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After gracing you with one last disinterested glance, the Warden phases out of reality in a flare of green light. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their faces covered by rebreathers in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras dedicarte una última mirada de desinterés, el guardián desaparece de la realidad en un destello de luz verde. Los soldados de Krieg entran en acción, dirigiendo sus caras cubiertas por respiradores hacia ti y levantando sus rifles láser.{/n}

languages.text: {n}看守者用漠然的目光最后瞥了你一眼，随后便在一阵绿光中凭空消失了。克里格士兵们立刻行动起来，他们将那被呼吸面罩遮住的脸转向你，举起了激光枪。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After gracing you with one last disinterested glance, the Warden phases out of reality in a flare of green light. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their faces covered by rebreathers in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}看守者用漠然的目光最后瞥了你一眼，随后便在一阵绿光中凭空消失了。克里格士兵们立刻行动起来，他们将那被呼吸面罩遮住的脸转向你，举起了激光枪。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nachdem er dich mit einem letzten uninteressierten Blick bedacht hat, verabschiedet sich der Wächter mit einer Reflexion aus grünem Licht aus der Realität. Die Krieg-Soldaten erwachen zum Leben, wenden ihre mit Atemschutzgeräten bedeckten Gesichter in deine Richtung und heben ihr Lasergewehre.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After gracing you with one last disinterested glance, the Warden phases out of reality in a flare of green light. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their faces covered by rebreathers in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nachdem er dich mit einem letzten uninteressierten Blick bedacht hat, verabschiedet sich der Wächter mit einer Reflexion aus grünem Licht aus der Realität. Die Krieg-Soldaten erwachen zum Leben, wenden ihre mit Atemschutzgeräten bedeckten Gesichter in deine Richtung und heben ihr Lasergewehre.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sana son bir ilgisiz bakış attıktan sonra Muhafız, yeşil bir ışık parıltısıyla gerçekliğin dışına çıkıyor. Krieg askerleri harekete geçiyor, solunum cihazlarıyla kaplı yüzlerini sana çeviriyor ve silazerlerini kaldırıyorlar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After gracing you with one last disinterested glance, the Warden phases out of reality in a flare of green light. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their faces covered by rebreathers in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sana son bir ilgisiz bakış attıktan sonra Muhafız, yeşil bir ışık parıltısıyla gerçekliğin dışına çıkıyor. Krieg askerleri harekete geçiyor, solunum cihazlarıyla kaplı yüzlerini sana çeviriyor ve silazerlerini kaldırıyorlar.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Après vous avoir adressé un dernier regard indifférent, le gardien s'efface de la réalité dans un éclat de lumière verte. Les soldats de Krieg se mettent alors en mouvement et tournent vers vous des visages masqués par leurs respirateurs tout en levant leurs fusils laser.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After gracing you with one last disinterested glance, the Warden phases out of reality in a flare of green light. The Krieg soldiers spring into motion, turning their faces covered by rebreathers in your direction and raising their lasguns.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Après vous avoir adressé un dernier regard indifférent, le gardien s'efface de la réalité dans un éclat de lumière verte. Les soldats de Krieg se mettent alors en mouvement et tournent vers vous des visages masqués par leurs respirateurs tout en levant leurs fusils laser.{/n}
